DESCRIPTION: Open a course details page and assert the 'About Course' section is displayed
NAME: openCourseDetails

DESCRIPTION: Search with a valid keyword and assert page navigates to search results
NAME: searchWithValidKeyword

DESCRIPTION: Click Facebook icon in footer and assert URL contains facebook.com
NAME: verifyFacebookLink

DESCRIPTION: Verify the first course card contains image, title, instructor name, and subscribe button
NAME: verifyCourseCardUI

DESCRIPTION: Login with valid credentials, subscribe to a course, assert navigation to course page
NAME: subscribeToCoursAfterLogin

DESCRIPTION: Register with empty name field and assert validation error is displayed
NAME: registerWithEmptyUsername

DESCRIPTION: Login with empty fields and assert validation messages appear
NAME: loginWithEmptyFields

DESCRIPTION: Click on 'Join Us' and assert the URL contains /register or /signup
NAME: openRegistrationPage

DESCRIPTION: Click YouTube or Instagram icon in footer and assert new tab URL is a social media platform
NAME: verifyYouTubeLinkOrInstagram

DESCRIPTION: Click LinkedIn icon in footer and assert URL contains linkedin.com
NAME: verifyLinkedInLink

DESCRIPTION: Login with invalid credentials and assert error message is displayed
NAME: loginWithInvalidCredentials

DESCRIPTION: Click YouTube icon in footer and assert new tab URL contains youtube.com
NAME: verifyYouTubeLink
